title: Places for a date — running 2021→2024 location vault
html:
TL;DR

  • Living Corvallis / Portland / Japan / SF date-spot vault started Oct 2021, last edited May 2024. Hyper-specific picnic tables and parking lots near OSU buildings (Cordley Hall, LaSells, Beth Ray Center, Sackett Hall, Dearborn tunnel, Linus Pauling).
  • Includes "Tunnel of Love, Klevan Ukraine" as bucket-list and dedicated Japan and Portland sections.
  • Corvo (Corvallis) restaurant section: Crowbar rooftop, Corazon, TreeBeerds, Majestic theatre. Most still-relevant Corvallis spots.
  • The granular table-by-stadium / parking-lot-behind-Dairy-Queen specificity reads like he was actually scouting these in person — real fieldnotes, not aspirational copy-paste.
  • "Burma superstar (San Francisco)" is the only out-of-region entry, suggesting an SF trip context.

Key quotes

"'secret' trail spot by 891 sw 30th Street"

"Picnic table by Cordell West Dock ** CORDLEY HALL"

"Tunnel of Love, Klevan Ukraine"

"Endo style village" (under Japan)

Why it matters in the graph

  • Corvallis date-mapping at this granular a level is identity-revealing about how Yahir prepared for relationships — pre-research, low-cost intentionality, hidden spots over conventional restaurants. Aligns with the 2025 10 28 exactly what i want vibe (small intimate moments > flashy ones).
  • Confirms corvallis or OSU geography fluency in 2021. Pairs with 2022 09 13 drive thru weed todos that mention the same campus.
  • Pre-Sam (2024 04 27 sam) era; useful for tracking who he might've been dating in late 2021 / early 2022.

Open questions

  • Who was the date target in late 2021? (Pre-Sam.)
  • Did Tunnel of Love Ukraine ever happen? (War broke out 4 months after this list edit.)
  • Did he actually go to Burma Superstar?

Wikilinks

corvallis or · portland or · osu
